task: Repair wiki frame-loader around the geometric constraint manifold frontier
key_corrections: The central missing object is the actual geometric constraint manifold M(C), not Xi, Axis0, FEP, Verlinde, Rosetta, gravity, physics, or a QIT engine.

M(C) is the finite admissibility space M(C) = {x : x is admissible under active constraint set C}; C starts from F01 finitude, N01 noncommutation, admissible probe rules, and admissible composition rules.
Constraint manifold is not carrier geometry; carrier geometry is a candidate realization, readout, or support map inside/from/to M(C) and must be earned.
Required order is root constraints -> M(C) -> geometry on M(C) -> axes as A_i : M(C) -> V_i -> carrier/readout/coupling/engine/bridge candidates.
Bridge-facing scouts and theory correlations are blocked downstream consumers until the manifold object exists.
Axes 0-6 are coordinate/readout families over M(C), not primitive labels; Axis0 remains open/blocked until bridge/cut and manifold exist.

In the owner pattern lane, IGT means Irrational Game Theory; it is the WIN/LOSE plus win/lose two-engine pattern, not infinite game theory, information geometry theory/topology, generic game theory, or a QIT operator table.
Use observed/inferred/proposed/open/blocked/killed language and do not claim current manifold admission.
